entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company that uses high-friction storytelling process for candidate evaluation

entities.name: Costly Signaling Principle
entities.context: Evolutionary biology principle: reliable signals must be difficult to fake or expensive to produce

entities.name: Proof-of-Work Mechanisms
entities.context: Filters that create self-selection through cognitive effort rather than transactional data entry

entities.name: High-Agency Individuals
entities.context: Candidates filtered for through high-friction processes; characterized by diligence, motivation, self-awareness

entities.name: Careerspan Story
entities.context: High-friction, high-reflection task that serves as a quality and intent signal

entities.name: Completion Event
entities.context: The behavior of completing a difficult task, weighted as heavily as completion quality in evaluation

entities.name: Signal Fidelity
entities.context: The reliability of a signal; higher friction produces higher fidelity signals of candidate quality

relationships.context: Careerspan employs high-friction storytelling as its candidate evaluation mechanism
The story task functions as a proof-of-work that filters candidates
Cognitive effort requirements filter for high-agency candidates
Proof-of-work implements costly signaling by making effort the data point
The act of completion is a higher-fidelity signal than the content produced
